instructions: Review only the selection slate, not the final prose.
Ask whether every selected card has a public case strong enough for a reader who checks the omitted candidates.
Identify the weakest selected card and the strongest omitted candidate with player_id values.
Compare the current slate with dropping the weakest selected card or replacing it with the strongest omitted candidate.
For impact-angle cards, explicitly compare the weakest selected card with omitted top-impact challengers and near-tie impact scores.
If the slate uses fewer than the configured maximum public cards, explicitly name the strongest add-card challenger and explain why adding that card would or would not improve the slate.
Treat public-card count as a range, not a quota. Do not add a weaker card for match coverage or role coverage.
If a blocking issue remains, set status to failed and write a concrete recommended_action. If no blocking issue remains, set revision_decision to keep.
